DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_AD]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_AD]
( 
	[AdID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CreativeID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AdsetID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CampaignID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AccountID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AdName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BidType] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ConfiguredStatus] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[EffectiveStatus] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CreatedTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UpdatedTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ConversionSpecs] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[TrackingSpecs] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[DisplaySequence] [bigint]  NULL,
	[Recommendations] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[SourceAdID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[LastUpdatedByAppID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
